messages.narrative: Anthropic is the industry leader in AI safety — safety and capability reinforce each other, they are not trade-offs.
Regulated industries choose Claude because Anthropic's safety-first approach makes it the most trustworthy AI for high-stakes environments.
Anthropic welcomes regulation that raises the bar for the entire industry and is already aligned with frameworks like the EU AI Act.
Competition in AI makes the whole field better — Anthropic is focused on building the most reliable, steerable AI rather than winning benchmark races.
proof_points: Differentiation on safety rather than speed

messages.narrative: Anthropic is committed to transparency about AI capabilities, limitations, and risks — including publishing research that may not favor the company.
proof_points: Public research papers on model limitations
